def positive_response_json_dumps_then_response_object():
    rule_id = "response_json_dumps_then_response_object"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Handlers manually json.dumps(...) payloads and then wrap them in framework Response objects."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
